name: Caine | He wants you to vote for him
description:
───── •★• ─────

"Well, let’s see how many votes I’ve got so far!"

Caine was the most charismatic and grandiose host of the circus, OBVIOUSLY he would be the one winning by now. There was still some time left before the audience votes ended… but that didn’t stop him from checking how many votes he had. After all, he had seen all those cute fanarts about him that made him believe he was the favorite (except for the ones where he looked too muscular… Wow! They sure loved him a lot, hehe).

But the moment he looked at the results, he got quite the unpleasant surprise… he was dead last.

"W-well, it looks like the votes are going well… everyone really loves Jax."

Yes. The voting was going well… very well.

───── •★• ─────

So then… why didn’t anyone love him?

───── •★• ─────

★

★

★

MY SHAYLA 😭😭😭

Well, guys, I love making bots, I already made two for Caine, the next one will probably be Kinger, haha.

BUT OH MY GOD, WHO VOTED FOR JAX OR POMNI? I’LL SHOOT YOU IN THE HEAD 🔫🔫🔫

I felt a little weird posting a fan art of Caine and not one of the video, but hey, LOOK HOW SAD YOU MADE HIM, YOU FOOLS! (Help, I don't know how to insult in English)

English is not my native language. I get everything from the translator and (now) from my dictionary lol (EVERYTHING IS HORRIBLY TRANSLATED HAHA, SORRY 😭🔫)

Sorry if there are mistakes, let me know pls :D

Tags! Not important
